briefing_zh:
今天最强的信号是一场 agent 评测的「清算日」。UC Berkeley（Dawn Song 团队）联合 250+ 行业专家的 **Agents' Last Exam (ALE)** 是旗舰：1000+ 个经济价值高、可验证的专业任务，对齐美国联邦职业分类，而最强配置整体通过率只有 26.2%、最难档位不到 10%。HuggingFace 上高赞的 **AdaPlanBench** 从另一个角度补刀——检验 agent 在世界约束与用户约束逐步揭示时能否自适应重规划；**AutoLab** 则把战场搬到超长周期的自动科研与工程，17 个前沿模型里只有 Claude Opus 4.6 拉开身位。结论一致：一旦把任务做「真」，今天的 agent 还远没到能托付专业工作的程度。

与「评测变难」并行的是「能力怎么补」。上海 AI Lab 牵头的 **SubtleMemory** 把 agent 记忆评测从「记没记得」推进到「能否分辨细微不同、甚至相互冲突的记忆」，直指长周期 agent 的关系型记忆短板。**MLEvolve** 则给出一条乐观路径：自演化的多 agent 框架用蒙特卡洛图搜索自动发现 ML 算法，在 MLE-Bench 上以一半的时间预算拿到 65.3% 夺牌率。HuggingFace 当日最高赞的 **Code2LoRA** 从工程侧提供另一种「补上下文」的思路——用超网络即时生成仓库专属 LoRA adapter，零推理 token 开销地把仓库知识注入代码大模型。

世界模型与训练理论是另一条主线。英伟达的 **Cosmos 3** 是今天最重的开源动作：一个用单一 Mixture-of-Transformers 主干联合处理语言、图像、视频、音频和动作的全模态世界模型，把 VLM、视频生成、世界模拟、world-action 模型一并收编，并开放代码与权重，剑指具身 / Physical AI 的通用底座。训练侧，Yale/NUS 的 **Why Muon Outperforms Adam** 从曲率角度给这个当红优化器一个干净的机理解释：Muon 约 2 倍的效率优势来自更低的归一化方向锐度（NDS），而非更新尺度。

开源与社区情绪同样务实。GitHub 这周的热度集中在「agent 基础设施」与「agent skills 生态」：**sandboxd** 用一条命令给编码 agent 提供带预览 URL 的隔离沙箱，**guard-skills** 则把「给 AI 生成代码把关」做成可组合的质量门禁——共同信号是瓶颈正从「生成」转向「安全执行与验证」。HN 上，开发者在 Ask HN 里盘点真实的 AI 工作流，微软发布基于 OpenClaw 的自主 agent **Scout**，还有人主张「agent 让 RSS 重新有了意义」。把这些拼起来，今天的故事很清晰：评测在变残酷，能力在补短板，底座在开源化，社区正从兴奋转向务实。
briefing_en:
Today's strongest signal is a reckoning in agent evaluation. The flagship is **Agents' Last Exam (ALE)** from UC Berkeley (Dawn Song's group) with 250+ industry experts: 1,000+ economically valuable, verifiable professional tasks mapped to the U.S. federal occupational taxonomy — yet the best configuration passes just 26.2% overall and under 10% on the hardest tier. On HuggingFace, the heavily-upvoted **AdaPlanBench** attacks from another angle, testing whether agents can adaptively re-plan as world and user constraints are revealed progressively; **AutoLab** moves the battlefield to ultra-long-horizon auto research and engineering, where only Claude Opus 4.6 pulls clearly ahead of 17 frontier models. The consensus: once tasks are made realistic, today's agents are nowhere near trustworthy for professional work.

Running parallel to harder evals is the question of how to close the gap. Shanghai AI Lab's **SubtleMemory** pushes agent memory evaluation past 'did you remember it' toward 'can you tell subtly different — even conflicting — memories apart,' targeting the relational-memory weakness of long-horizon agents. **MLEvolve** offers an optimistic path: a self-evolving multi-agent framework that uses Monte Carlo Graph Search to autonomously discover ML algorithms, hitting a 65.3% medal rate on MLE-Bench at half the usual time budget. The day's top HuggingFace paper, **Code2LoRA**, gives an engineering answer to context injection — a hypernetwork that generates repository-specific LoRA adapters, injecting repo knowledge into code LLMs with zero inference-time token overhead.

World models and training theory form a second thread. NVIDIA's **Cosmos 3** is the day's heaviest open-source move: an omnimodal world model that jointly processes language, image, video, audio, and action in a single Mixture-of-Transformers backbone, subsuming VLMs, video generators, world simulators, and world-action models, with code and checkpoints released — a serious open backbone for embodied / Physical AI. On the training side, Yale/NUS's **Why Muon Outperforms Adam** gives this now-popular optimizer a clean mechanistic explanation from curvature: Muon's ~2x efficiency edge comes from lower Normalized Directional Sharpness (NDS), not update scale.

Open source and community mood are equally pragmatic. GitHub's heat clusters around agent infrastructure and the agent-skills ecosystem: **sandboxd** gives coding agents isolated, preview-URL sandboxes in one command, while **guard-skills** turns 'gate the AI-generated code' into composable quality checks — a shared signal that the bottleneck is shifting from generation to safe execution and verification. On HN, developers compare real AI workflows in an Ask HN, Microsoft ships **Scout** (an autonomous agent on OpenClaw), and one post argues 'AI agents make RSS matter again.' Put together, the story is clear: evals are getting brutal, capabilities are patching their weak spots, backbones are going open, and the community is shifting from excitement to pragmatism.
viral_analysis_zh: 今天最可能火的是 **Agents' Last Exam (ALE)**：「最后的考试」这个挑衅性框架、Dawn Song + UC Berkeley + 250 位行业专家的背书，再加上「最强 agent 在真实专业任务上整体只过 26.2%、最难档不到 10%」这种既能喂给唱多派也能喂给唱衰派的数字，天然适合在 X 上引爆两边对线。次热的是那条「Opus 4.8 一次性完成形式化验证多边形相交」的 Show HN——具体、可复现、带「前沿模型跨过门槛」的爽点，是开发者圈最爱转发的硬核炫技。微软 **Scout** 靠大厂光环保证基础曝光，但评论区的「发布疲劳」说明纯公告越来越难破圈。
viral_analysis_en: The most likely to go viral today is **Agents' Last Exam (ALE)**: the provocative 'Last Exam' framing, the Dawn Song + UC Berkeley + 250-expert pedigree, and a number ('the best agent passes only 26.2% overall and <10% on the hardest tier') that feeds both hype and skeptic camps make it tailor-made to ignite both sides on X. Second is the Show HN where 'Opus 4.8 one-shots a formally verified polygon intersection' — concrete, reproducible, and carrying that 'frontier model crossed a threshold' payoff that developers love to reshare. Microsoft's **Scout** gets baseline reach from brand gravity, but the 'launch fatigue' in the comments shows pure announcements struggle to break out.

huggingface_papers.title: Code2LoRA: Hypernetwork-Generated Adapters for Code Language Models under Software Evolution
huggingface_papers.tldr: Code2LoRA is a hypernetwork that generates repository-specific LoRA adapters on the fly, injecting repo-level context (imports, APIs, project conventions) into code LLMs with zero inference-time token overhead. Unlike RAG (long inputs) or per-repository fine-tuning (costly and brittle to code changes), it amortizes repo knowledge into a generated adapter, with a static snapshot mode plus support for evolving codebases. A practical answer to the repo-context problem that doesn't blow up the context window.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: Code2LoRA 用一个超网络（hypernetwork）即时生成仓库专属的 LoRA adapter，把仓库级上下文（import、API、项目约定）注入代码大模型，且推理时零额外 token 开销。相比 RAG（长输入）或逐仓库微调（成本高、代码一变就失效），它把仓库知识摊销进生成的 adapter 里，提供静态快照模式，也能应对持续演进的代码库。是对「仓库上下文」难题一个不撑爆上下文窗口的实用解法。
huggingface_papers.authors: Liliana Hotsko, Yinxi Li, Yuntian Deng, et al.

huggingface_papers.title: ArcANE: Do Role-Playing Language Agents Stay in Character at the Right Time?
huggingface_papers.tldr: ArcANE benchmarks whether role-playing language agents track a character's evolving psychology rather than holding a fixed persona. Spanning 17 novels and 80 principal characters, it segments each narrative into 'Character Arc' phases along a psychological axis and poses the same scenario at different points to test temporal consistency. It targets a gap existing benchmarks miss: factual recall vs. arc-aware behavioral alignment, including in scenarios the source text never explores.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: ArcANE 评测角色扮演语言 agent 是否能跟随角色心理的演变，而不是死守一个固定人设。覆盖 17 部小说、80 个主要角色，沿心理轴把叙事切成不同的「角色弧」阶段，在同一情景下于不同时间点反复提问，检验时序一致性。它瞄准现有 benchmark 忽略的缺口：事实记忆 vs. 弧线感知的行为对齐，甚至包括原文从未涉及的情景。
huggingface_papers.authors: Woojung Song, Nalim Kim, Sangjun Song, et al.

huggingface_papers.title: TIDE: Proactive Multi-Problem Discovery via Template-Guided Iteration
huggingface_papers.tldr: TIDE reframes agents from reactive responders into proactive problem-finders: instead of acting only on explicit requests, it discovers multiple hidden problems latent in the user's broader context, grounds each in supporting evidence, and pairs it with a concrete action. A template-guided iterative framework surfaces coexisting issues whose total count is unknown upfront. A step toward agents that catch what users didn't think to ask about.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: TIDE 把 agent 从被动应答者重塑为主动的问题发现者：不只响应明确请求，而是从用户更广的上下文里挖出多个隐藏问题，为每个问题找到支撑证据并配上具体行动。它用模板引导的迭代框架来揭示那些数量未知、共存的问题。朝着「能发现用户没想到要问的事」的 agent 迈进了一步。
huggingface_papers.authors: Soyeong Jeong, Jinheon Baek, Minki Kang, et al.

huggingface_papers.title: AdaPlanBench: Evaluating Adaptive Planning in Large Language Model Agents under World and User Constraints
huggingface_papers.tldr: AdaPlanBench tests whether LLM agents can adaptively (re)plan when world and user constraints aren't fully specified upfront but are revealed progressively through interaction. Built on 307 household tasks with a scalable generation pipeline, it probes the realistic case where requirements surface mid-task — a blind spot in static planning benchmarks — and isolates re-planning under dual, progressively-disclosed constraints.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: AdaPlanBench 检验 LLM agent 能否在世界约束和用户约束都没一次性给全、而是随交互逐步揭示时，自适应地（重新）规划。基于 307 个家庭任务和可扩展的生成流程，它聚焦于「需求在任务中途才浮现」这个现实场景——这正是静态规划 benchmark 的盲区——并专门隔离了双重、渐进式约束下的重规划能力。
huggingface_papers.authors: Jiayu Liu, Cheng Qian, Zhenhailong Wang, et al.

huggingface_papers.title: VideoKR: Towards Knowledge- and Reasoning-Intensive Video Understanding
huggingface_papers.tldr: VideoKR is the first large-scale corpus built specifically to strengthen knowledge- and reasoning-intensive video understanding: 315K reasoning examples over 145K newly collected, CC-licensed expert-domain videos. A human-in-the-loop, skill-oriented pipeline targets progressively deeper reasoning while controlling difficulty, diversity, and CoT-rationale reliability. It ships VideoKR-Eval, an expert-annotated benchmark whose questions require genuine video reasoning rather than shortcut answers.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: VideoKR 是首个专门为强化「知识密集 + 推理密集」视频理解而构建的大规模语料：在 145K 个新采集的 CC 授权专家领域视频上，提供 315K 条视频推理样本。一条人在回路、技能导向的流程逐步逼近更深的推理，同时控制难度、多样性和 CoT 推理链的可靠性。配套发布 VideoKR-Eval 专家标注 benchmark，问题需要真正的视频推理而非走捷径。
huggingface_papers.authors: Lin Fu, Zheyuan Yang, Yang Wang, et al.

alphaxiv_papers.title: Agents' Last Exam
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: A living benchmark of 1,000+ economically valuable, long-horizon professional tasks with verifiable outputs, built by UC Berkeley (Dawn Song) with 250+ industry experts and mapped to the U.S. federal occupational taxonomy. The top configuration passes just 26.2% overall and under 10% on the hardest tier (~2.6% full-pass average), exposing a wide gap between current agents and real professional work. It aims to cover 90%+ of non-physical industries — the broadest agent-capability exam to date.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 一个「活」的 benchmark，包含 1000+ 个经济价值高、长周期、产出可验证的专业任务，由 UC Berkeley（Dawn Song 团队）联合 250+ 行业专家构建，并对齐美国联邦职业分类。最强配置整体通过率仅 26.2%，最难档位不到 10%（完整通过率均值约 2.6%），暴露出当前 agent 与真实专业工作之间的巨大差距。目标覆盖 90%+ 的非体力行业，是迄今覆盖面最广的 agent 能力大考。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Cosmos 3: Omnimodal World Models for Physical AI
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: NVIDIA's Cosmos 3 is a family of omnimodal world models that jointly process and generate language, image, video, audio, and action in one Mixture-of-Transformers backbone, effectively subsuming VLMs, video generators, world simulators, and world-action models. It claims state-of-the-art across a broad suite of understanding and generation tasks and leads open-source on robot policy generation (39.7% RoboLab success). Code, checkpoints, and synthetic data are released under an open license — a serious open backbone for embodied / Physical AI agents.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 英伟达的 Cosmos 3 是一族全模态世界模型，用单一的 Mixture-of-Transformers 主干联合处理与生成语言、图像、视频、音频和动作，等于把 VLM、视频生成器、世界模拟器和 world-action 模型收编进一个框架。它宣称在大量理解与生成任务上达到 SOTA，并在机器人策略生成上领跑开源（RoboLab 成功率 39.7%）。代码、权重和合成数据以开放许可发布——是面向具身 / Physical AI agent 的一个分量十足的开源底座。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Why Muon Outperforms Adam: A Curvature Perspective
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: This Yale/NUS paper explains Muon's ~2x training-efficiency edge over Adam through loss-landscape curvature. Via a second-order Taylor analysis, Muon achieves a larger one-step loss decrease at matched validation loss: both optimizers have comparable first-order gains and update norms, but Muon incurs a smaller second-order curvature penalty, driven by lower Normalized Directional Sharpness (NDS) — not update scale. The advantage comes from balancing update energy across curvature groups, especially within-layer in mid/late training. A clean mechanistic 'why' behind a now-popular optimizer.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 这篇 Yale / 新加坡国立的论文从损失曲面曲率的角度解释 Muon 相对 Adam 约 2 倍的训练效率优势。通过二阶泰勒分析，Muon 在验证损失相同的情况下取得更大的单步损失下降：两者一阶增益和更新范数相当，但 Muon 的二阶曲率惩罚更小，根源在更低的归一化方向锐度（NDS），而非更新尺度。其优势来自在不同曲率组间平衡更新能量，尤其在训练中后期的层内曲率上。为这个当红优化器给出了干净的机理性「为什么」。

alphaxiv_papers.title: SubtleMemory: A Benchmark for Fine-Grained Relational Memory Discrimination in Long-Horizon AI Agents
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: SubtleMemory targets a hard, under-tested agent skill: relational memory reasoning over long horizons — aggregating compatible evidence, distinguishing near-identical contexts, and reconciling conflicting memory records. Built via a five-stage pipeline from semantic-fact seeds (user preferences/habits and world facts) and their variants, it stresses fine-grained discrimination rather than coarse recall. From a Shanghai AI Lab-led team, it pushes agent memory evaluation past 'did you remember it' toward 'can you tell subtly different memories apart.'
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: SubtleMemory 瞄准一个困难且少有测试的 agent 能力：长周期下的关系型记忆推理——聚合相容证据、区分高度相似的上下文、调和相互冲突的记忆记录。它通过五阶段流程，从语义事实种子（用户偏好 / 习惯与世界知识）及其变体构建，强调细粒度辨别而非粗粒度回忆。出自上海 AI Lab 牵头的团队，把 agent 记忆评测从「你记没记得」推进到「你能否分辨细微不同的记忆」。

alphaxiv_papers.title: MLEvolve: A Self-Evolving Framework for Automated Machine Learning Algorithm Discovery
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: MLEvolve is a self-evolving multi-agent framework that autonomously searches, designs, and optimizes end-to-end ML pipelines (preprocessing -> feature engineering -> training -> prediction) using a Progressive Monte Carlo Graph Search over candidate pipelines. On MLE-Bench (75 Kaggle tasks) it hits a 65.3% average medal rate and 34.7% gold rate under a 12-hour budget — half the runtime of many baselines — and generalizes to AlphaEvolve math-optimization tasks. Strong evidence that agentic, search-driven AutoML is closing in on expert Kaggle performance.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: MLEvolve 是一个自演化的多 agent 框架，用渐进式蒙特卡洛图搜索（MCGS）在候选流程上自主搜索、设计并优化端到端 ML 管线（预处理→特征工程→训练→预测）。在 MLE-Bench（75 个 Kaggle 任务）上，它在 12 小时预算内取得 65.3% 的平均夺牌率和 34.7% 的金牌率——只用了许多基线一半的运行时间——并能泛化到 AlphaEvolve 数学优化任务。这是「agentic、搜索驱动的 AutoML 正在逼近专家级 Kaggle 表现」的有力证据。

github_repos.name: tastyeffectco/sandboxd
github_repos.tldr: Self-hosted dev sandboxes with instant preview URLs in one command — no Kubernetes. Pitched explicitly for coding agents and 'SaaS factories' that need isolated, disposable environments to run generated code safely, using Docker-based isolation with Pinokio integration. Rides the agent-infra wave where the bottleneck is safe execution, not generation.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 自托管的开发沙箱，一条命令即可生成带即时预览 URL 的隔离环境，无需 Kubernetes。明确面向需要安全运行生成代码的「编码 agent」和「SaaS 工厂」，基于 Docker 隔离并集成 Pinokio。踩在 agent 基础设施的风口上——瓶颈已经不是生成，而是安全执行。

github_repos.name: amElnagdy/guard-skills
github_repos.tldr: A collection of 'guard skills' for coding agents — quality gates that catch the characteristic failure modes of AI-generated code, tests, and docs before they ship. Packaged as composable agent skills (Claude Code, Codex, etc.), with WordPress/WooCommerce coverage included. Reflects a maturing ecosystem norm: don't just generate code, gate it.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 一套面向编码 agent 的「守卫技能」（guard skills）——在 AI 生成的代码、测试和文档上线前，拦住它们典型失败模式的质量门禁。以可组合的 agent skill 形式打包（Claude Code、Codex 等），还覆盖 WordPress/WooCommerce。反映了生态走向成熟的一条规范：别只管生成代码，还要给它把关。

github_repos.name: JimLiu/baoyu-design
github_repos.tldr: Runs 'Claude Design' locally as an agent skill so Cursor, Claude Code, and others can produce polished UI mockups, prototypes, decks, and wireframes as self-contained HTML — without needing claude.ai/design. Best with Opus-class models. Part of the booming 'agent skills' trend that turns a hosted capability into a portable local workflow.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 把「Claude Design」作为 agent skill 在本地运行，让 Cursor、Claude Code 等能直接产出精致的 UI 原型、样机、演示稿和线框图（自包含 HTML），无需依赖 claude.ai/design。配 Opus 级模型效果最佳。属于火热的「agent skills」潮流——把托管能力变成可移植的本地工作流。

github_repos.name: FerroxLabs/wayland
github_repos.tldr: An ambitiously-scoped open-source AI agent framework branded around a perceive -> reason -> act -> evolve loop. The marketing leans on slogans, but a healthy 40-fork count suggests real hands-on interest. Worth watching as another entrant in the crowded general-purpose agent-framework field — verify substance against the buzzwords before adopting.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 一个野心不小的开源 AI agent 框架，主打「感知→推理→行动→进化」的循环。宣传上口号较多，但相对健康的 fork 数（40）说明确有人上手在用。可作为通用 agent 框架这条拥挤赛道上的又一个选手观察——采用前先用实际内容核对一下这些 buzzword。

github_repos.name: Forlives/21-day-self-interview
github_repos.tldr: A Hermes Agent skill that acts as an AI existential-psychology counselor: every night for 21 days it asks you 3 meaningful questions, remembers your answers, and reflects your own words back to you. Bilingual zh/en, cron-driven journaling. Its standout 52-fork / 149-star ratio signals genuine personal adoption — a nice example of agents used for reflection, not just productivity.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 一个 Hermes Agent skill，扮演 AI 存在主义心理咨询师：连续 21 天，每晚问你 3 个有分量的问题，记住你的回答，并把你自己的话反射回来给你。中英双语、由 cron 驱动的日记机制。其亮眼的 52 fork / 149 star 比例说明确有真实的个人使用——是「agent 用于自我反思而非只是生产力」的一个好例子。

hackernews.title: Ask HN: What is your (AI) dev tech stack / workflow?
hackernews.tldr: A high-engagement Ask HN where developers compare their day-to-day AI-assisted stacks and workflows — which models, agents, editors, and glue they actually rely on in 2026. The 130-comment thread is a useful pulse-check on how practitioners are really wiring coding agents into their work, beyond vendor marketing.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 一个高热度的 Ask HN，开发者们在此比较各自日常的 AI 辅助技术栈和工作流——2026 年他们真正依赖的是哪些模型、agent、编辑器和粘合工具。130 条评论是一份有用的「实践者脉搏检测」，能看出大家在营销话术之外究竟如何把编码 agent 接入工作。

hackernews.title: Microsoft announces Scout, an autonomous AI agent built on OpenClaw
hackernews.tldr: Microsoft unveiled Scout, an autonomous AI agent built on the OpenClaw harness, signaling continued big-vendor investment in agents that act independently across software. The 87-comment HN thread splits between genuine interest and fatigue with corporate agent launches — a recurring 2026 dynamic. Notably, OpenClaw is the same GUI-agent harness featured in benchmark work like Agents' Last Exam.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 微软发布了 Scout——一个基于 OpenClaw harness 构建的自主 AI agent，表明大厂仍在持续押注能跨软件独立行动的 agent。87 条 HN 评论在「真有兴趣」和「对大厂 agent 发布疲劳」之间分裂——这是 2026 年反复出现的氛围。值得注意的是，OpenClaw 正是 Agents' Last Exam 等 benchmark 工作中所用的同一个 GUI-agent harness。

hackernews.title: Show HN: Formally verified polygon intersection – Opus 4.8 oneshots, prev failed
hackernews.tldr: A Show HN where the author reports Claude Opus 4.8 one-shotting a formally verified polygon-intersection implementation that previous models failed on. It lands as a concrete 'frontier models crossed a capability threshold' anecdote for hard, verification-grade code — the kind of specific, reproducible flex that draws developer attention amid benchmark skepticism.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 一个 Show HN，作者称 Claude Opus 4.8 一次性（oneshot）完成了此前模型都失败的、形式化验证的多边形相交实现。它成了一个具体的「前沿模型跨过某个能力门槛」的轶事，针对的是验证级的高难度代码——正是这种具体、可复现的「秀肌肉」，在 benchmark 怀疑论盛行时最能抓住开发者注意力。

hackernews.title: Now AI agents need what RSS does
hackernews.tldr: An argument that AI agents revive the case for RSS: structured, pollable, machine-readable feeds are exactly what autonomous agents need to monitor the web without scraping fragile HTML. The thread debates whether agents will resurrect RSS or just reinvent it under a new name — a recurring 'old protocols meet new agents' theme.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 一篇文章主张 AI agent 让 RSS 重新变得有意义：结构化、可轮询、机器可读的 feed，正是自主 agent 监控网络、又不必去爬脆弱 HTML 所需要的。评论区在争论 agent 会让 RSS 复活，还是只会换个名字把它重新发明一遍——这是反复出现的「老协议遇上新 agent」主题。

hackernews.title: Launch HN: Hyper (YC P26) – Company brain to power agentic development
hackernews.tldr: Launch HN for Hyper (YC P26), a 'company brain' that centralizes organizational knowledge to power agentic development — the premise being that coding agents are only as good as the company context they can draw on. The 76-comment thread probes the category's perennial questions: data moats, retrieval quality, and whether 'company brain' is a product or a feature.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Hyper（YC P26）的 Launch HN，一个集中组织知识、为 agentic 开发提供动力的「公司大脑」——其逻辑是：编码 agent 的上限，取决于它能调用的公司上下文。76 条评论拷问着这一品类的老问题：数据护城河、检索质量，以及「公司大脑」到底是个产品还是个功能。
